subject: [STRIMZI] Make Strimzi ServiceMesh compatible
commit_message:
[STRIMZI] Make Strimzi ServiceMesh compatible

In case of SM for Zookeeper the following options is added:
- sslQuorum: false

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1621
Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: I6092761dbd5ac005424d759a813a119a0ab9f0c2
